rag_rules: Insert generated AGREE annex blocks into the intended target component or implementation while preserving AADL architecture
Place component type contracts in component type annexes and implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture when inserting annex blocks
Use valid component type scopes for component type contracts
Use valid implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings
Use AGREE logical operators for generated contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for declarations
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not use opaque Boolean data range comparisons
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
Do not place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in component type annexes without concrete bounds or visible relations
irrelevant_topics: AGREE, annex, assume, guarantee, assign, validator, or repair
